item.title: BC.GAME
item.description: BC.Game is a crypto-first online casino offering provably fair games, instant cryptocurrency deposits and withdrawals, and a wide selection of slots, live dealer games, and in-house originals. Known for its fast gameplay and low entry barriers, it is popular among crypto users but restricts access in certain regions.

item.title: BetFury
item.description: BetFury is an online crypto gambling and gaming platform that allows users to play casino-style games, place bets, and earn rewards using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin. It combines traditional online casino features with blockchain-based elements, including its native BFG token, which users can earn and stake for dividends. The platform is known for its reward system, promotions, and integration of decentralized finance concepts into gaming.

item.title: BetPanda
item.description: BetPanda is an online crypto-based casino and sportsbook launched around 2023, offering thousands of games (slots, live casino, and sports betting) and supporting deposits and withdrawals in cryptocurrencies. It emphasizes fast transactions, user anonymity (minimal or no KYC), and a wide range of betting options, including esports and live betting.

item.title: Stake
item.description: Stake is a global crypto casino and sportsbook where users gamble online using cryptocurrencies. It offers a wide range of slots, live dealer tables, and sports betting markets, and is well known for its loyalty program and high-profile sponsorships.

item.title: Gamdom
item.description: Gamdom is an online crypto-based gambling platform that offers casino games, sports betting, and esports wagering. Founded in 2016, it originally focused on CS:GO skin betting but has since evolved into a full-scale crypto casino with thousands of games, live betting options, and cryptocurrency payments.

item.title: MetaWin
item.description: MetaWin is a crypto-powered online gaming and rewards platform where users can play casino-style games, enter competitions, and win prizes using blockchain technology. It focuses on transparent, provably fair gameplay and often integrates cryptocurrency wallets for deposits and payouts.

item.title: Roobet
item.description: Roobet is an online crypto casino platform where users can play games like slots, roulette, and live dealer games using cryptocurrencies. It also offers a proprietary game called Crash, where players bet on a rising multiplier and cash out before it drops.

item.title: Rollbit
item.description: Rollbit is a crypto-based online platform where users can gamble, bet on sports, and trade crypto using digital currencies instead of traditional money. It features unique in-house games alongside a full sportsbook and NFT marketplace integration.

item.title: Paradex
item.description: Paradex is a decentralized derivatives exchange (Perp DEX) that lets users trade perpetual futures, options, and spot markets with self-custody, combining CEX-like speed with on-chain settlement.

item.title: edgeX
item.description: EdgeX is a high-performance Perp DEX that combines off-chain order matching with on-chain settlement, offering fast, CEX-like trading with self-custody and deep liquidity.

item.title: Hyperliquid
item.description: Hyperliquid — A high-performance Perp DEX built on its own Layer 1 blockchain, offering fully on-chain order book trading with CEX-like speed, deep liquidity, and self-custody.

item.title: LuxDrop
item.description: LuxDrop is a popular online mystery unboxing platform where you open digital boxes or join PVP battles to win real prizes like luxury fashion, tech, and collectibles. It supports crypto payments and offers provably fair gameplay.

item.title: JemLit
item.description: Jemlit is an online mystery box platform where users pay to open virtual boxes for a chance to win real products like electronics, fashion items, or gift cards.

item.title: Cases.gg
item.description: Cases.gg is an online mystery box platform where users deposit money (often crypto), open virtual “cases,” and receive random real-world items such as electronics, fashion, or collectibles.

item.title: Affiliate Disclosure
item.description:
Our Relationship with Listed Platforms

Luxpin is an independent affiliate directory. Some of the platforms listed on this Site have affiliate agreements with us. This means that if you click a referral link and sign up to a platform, we may earn a commission — at no extra cost to you.

How It Works

When you click an outbound link marked with an arrow (↗) on Luxpin, you are directed to the platform’s website via our affiliate tracking link. If you create an account and meet the platform’s qualification criteria, Luxpin receives a referral commission. The commission is paid by the platform, not by you.

item.title: Cookie Policy
item.description:
What Are Cookies

Cookies are small text files placed on your device by websites you visit. They are widely used to make sites work efficiently and to provide information to site owners.

Cookies We Use

Essential Cookies

These cookies are necessary for the Site to function. They include cookies that remember your theme preference (dark/light mode). These cannot be disabled without affecting site functionality.

Cookie Purpose Duration
data-theme Stores your light/dark mode preference Session

Analytics Cookies

We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors use the Site. These cookies collect anonymised information such as page views, session duration, and traffic sources.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
1. Introduction

Luxpin (“we”, “our”, “us”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding that information.

2. Information We Collect

Automatically collected data: When you visit the Site, we may collect standard log data including your IP address, browser type, pages visited, and referring URLs. This is collected via Google Analytics and is used solely for aggregate traffic analysis.

item.title: Terms of Use
item.description:
1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using Luxpin (“the Site”), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Site.

2. About Luxpin

Luxpin is an independent affiliate directory that lists and reviews crypto-native platforms including casinos, sportsbooks, and decentralised exchanges. We do not operate any gambling or trading services ourselves.

3. Eligibility

You must be of legal age in your jurisdiction to gamble or trade before using any platform listed on this Site. It is your sole responsibility to ensure that accessing and using any listed platform is legal in your country or region.
